evidence: One of the best documentaries I have seen in a long time!

Well done series, good acting and good/true storyline.
One of the top shows on TV, in my opinion. To me, there have been so many lessons in it.

I would like to be able to watch more things, like all in the family, but I am very happy with both you and Netflix.

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and drama series, appreciating well-crafted narratives and high production quality. They value emotional depth and character-driven storytelling, indicating a taste for content that resonates on a personal level.
